<svg width="48" height="48" viewBox="-10.2941 -10.2941 44.5884 44.5884" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <rect x="-10.2941" y="-10.2941" width="44.5884" height="44.5884" rx="15" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.1"/>
    <style>
        @keyframes popup {
            0% {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: scale(0);
            }
            100% {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: scale(1);
            }
        }
        #wondersharefilmora-logo {
            animation: popup 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.68, -0.55, 0.265, 1.55) forwards;
        }
    </style>
    <g id="wondersharefilmora-logo">
        <title>Wondershare Filmora</title><path fill="currentColor" d="M5.475 0A5.463 5.463 0 0 0 0 5.475v13.05A5.463 5.463 0 0 0 5.475 24h13.05A5.463 5.463 0 0 0 24 18.525V5.475A5.463 5.463 0 0 0 18.525 0H5.475Zm4.552 3.6 4.026 4.029-4.617 4.623-.022-.023a1.088 1.088 0 0 0-.158-1.339L5.999 7.63l4.028-4.03ZM14.528 8l4.027 4.03-8.528 8.536L6 16.536 14.528 8Z"/>
    </g>
</svg>
